findings.title: Broad File Path Parameter
findings.description: Tool "get_endpoint_details" accepts file path parameter "path" but is not a file-related tool.
findings.evidence: Parameter "path" in non-file tool "get_endpoint_details"
findings.recommendation: Review why a non-file tool needs file path parameters. This could allow arbitrary file access.

findings.recommendation: Review why a non-file tool needs file path parameters. This could allow arbitrary file access.

findings.title: Toxic Flow Detected
findings.description: File exfiltration: READ_FILES → HTTP_OUT path exists across servers.
findings.evidence: Capability path: READ_FILES (filesystem/read_file, filesystem/list_directory, filesystem/get_file_info, github/get_file_contents, google-drive/get_file) → HTTP_OUT (fetch/fetch, github/create_pull_request)
findings.recommendation: Review whether these servers need to be configured together. Consider isolating servers to prevent cross-server attack chains.

findings.title: Toxic Flow Detected
findings.description: Database exfiltration: DB_ACCESS → HTTP_OUT path exists across servers.
findings.evidence: Capability path: DB_ACCESS (context7/query-docs, mysql/mysql_query, notion/post-database-query, notion/post-search, notion/post-page, notion/create-a-database, notion/update-a-database, notion/retrieve-a-database, playwright/browser_select_option, playwright/browser_type, playwright/browser_tabs, postgres/query, postgres/list_tables, postgres/describe_table, puppeteer/puppeteer_select, supabase/query_table, supabase/insert_row, supabase/update_row, supabase/delete_row) → HTTP_OUT (fetch/fetch, github/create_pull_request)
findings.recommendation: Review whether these servers need to be configured together. Consider isolating servers to prevent cross-server attack chains.

findings.title: Toxic Flow Detected
findings.description: Read + execute chain: READ_FILES → EXEC_CODE path exists across servers.
findings.evidence: Capability path: READ_FILES (filesystem/read_file, filesystem/list_directory, filesystem/get_file_info, github/get_file_contents, google-drive/get_file) → EXEC_CODE (playwright/browser_evaluate, playwright/browser_run_code, puppeteer/puppeteer_evaluate)
findings.recommendation: Review whether these servers need to be configured together. Consider isolating servers to prevent cross-server attack chains.

findings.title: Toxic Flow Detected
findings.description: Write + execute = RCE: WRITE_FILES → EXEC_CODE path exists across servers.
findings.evidence: Capability path: WRITE_FILES (filesystem/write_file, filesystem/edit_file, google-drive/create_file) → EXEC_CODE (playwright/browser_evaluate, playwright/browser_run_code, puppeteer/puppeteer_evaluate)
findings.recommendation: Review whether these servers need to be configured together. Consider isolating servers to prevent cross-server attack chains.

findings.title: Untrusted Content Processing
findings.description: Tool "create_or_update_file" processes messages and has write capabilities without mentioning sanitization.
findings.evidence: Processes messages with write capabilities
findings.recommendation: Ensure untrusted content is properly sanitized before processing. Consider adding input validation and output encoding.

findings.title: Untrusted Content Processing
findings.description: Tool "create_pull_request" processes pull requests and has write capabilities without mentioning sanitization.
findings.evidence: Processes pull requests with write capabilities
findings.recommendation: Ensure untrusted content is properly sanitized before processing. Consider adding input validation and output encoding.

findings.title: Untrusted Content Processing
findings.description: Tool "create-a-comment" processes comments and has write capabilities without mentioning sanitization.
findings.evidence: Processes comments with write capabilities
findings.recommendation: Ensure untrusted content is properly sanitized before processing. Consider adding input validation and output encoding.

findings.title: Untrusted Content Processing
findings.description: Tool "slack_post_message" processes messages and has write capabilities without mentioning sanitization.
findings.evidence: Processes messages with write capabilities
findings.recommendation: Ensure untrusted content is properly sanitized before processing. Consider adding input validation and output encoding.
